name: @ruminaider/metabase-cli
description_en: Metabase CLI with full read/write access: cards, dashboards, databases, tables, queries, collections, search, and revisions from the terminal. Token-efficient JSON output.
description_zh: 具有完整读/写访问权限的 Metabase CLI：从终端访问卡片、仪表板、数据库、表、查询、集合、搜索和修订。高效的 JSON 输出
